articles.title: ETH/BTC Somehow Keeps Plunging Even Lower
articles.description: Ethereum plunges to the lowest level against Bitcoin since early 2020

articles.title: Bitcoin drops below $77K as US confirms 104% tariffs on China
articles.description: Bitcoin dropped below $77,000 today after US President Donald Trump announced a 104% tariff on Chinese imports, escalating trade tensions that have unsettled global markets since April 2. The tariff announcement sparked volatility across risk assets, with both the S&P 500 and Nasdaq experiencing sharp intraday gains of around 4% before retreating to erase most of their daily gains. Bitcoin followed a similar pattern, briefly surging above $80,000 before falling below $77,000. Ahead of the t

articles.title: XRP Will Overtake Ethereum By 2028: Standard Chartered
articles.description: Standard Chartered on Tuesday forecasted that XRP’s (CRYPTO: XRP) market capitalization will overtake Ethereum's (CRYPTO: ETH) by the end of 2028, positioning XRP as the read more

articles.title: MegaETH: Supercharging Ethereum for the Real-Time Internet Era
articles.description: MegaETH is building a high-speed version of Ethereum designed to process transactions in real time and scale like traditional internet systems.

articles.title: Trump escalates trade war. BTC at 80k
articles.description: Donald Trump has reignited global trade tensions with a sharp warning to China—threatening a 50% tariff hike unless Beijing backs down—fueling market swings and raising concerns that his aggressive approach could trigger deeper economic disruption far beyond tariffs alone.

articles.title: Trump Eyes New Global Cryptocurrency Standards Amid Industry Debate
articles.description: U. S. President Trump discusses global cryptocurrency standards with world leaders, sparking debates on financial regulation and market impacts.
